name: Apricot Rice Pudding
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Non-fat egg substitute (equivalent to 3 eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice and 1 1/2 cups non-fat milk in a saucepan.
2. Heat to boiling.
3. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer until the milk is absorbed, about 15 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining 2 1/2 cups non-fat milk, egg substitute, sugar, salt, lemon zest, and vanilla. Stir in the apricots.
5. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch square pan and set it in a pan of hot water.
6. Bake at 325°F for 30-40 minutes or until set. Chill until serving time.
7. Just before serving, sprinkle brown sugar over the top of the custard and broil until the sugar melts and the top is lightly browned.
Each serving contains about: 114 calories; 86 milligrams sodium; 2 milligrams cholesterol; 1 gram fat; 23 grams carbohydrates; 5 grams protein; 0.24 gram fiber.
